{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221939432F16BA1E1E2CFCFB6030"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573897607392690968","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还挺好看的，我看了蛮多本足球教练文这本箅不错，就是作者一天就更一章🔪🔪🔪","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":12,"text":"足球教练","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%B3%E7%90%83%E6%95%99%E7%BB%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774179583FCFB6030%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227573897607392690968%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227551400737519979582%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%B3%E7%90%83%E6%95%99%E7%BB%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763437781,"group_id":"7551400737519979582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3PYMsxDPKQWYBGrKud0rl9/smhzLGttieApGL8BkCs0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"2903130056166384","user_name":"爱吃葱醋鸡的凶多吉少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2903130056166384","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1651814595,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551400737519979582","book_info":{"abstract":"伊森被诅咒了整整十年。
无论执教哪支俱乐部，他从未赢过一场比赛。全世界都称他为“被诅咒的教练”——球迷嘲讽他，球员轻视他，媒体更是对他口诛笔伐。
但在他终于迎来执教生涯的首场胜利时……他的心脏停止了跳动。
再次睁开眼时，他已不在德国。
破旧的办公室，破旧的办公桌，桌上摆放着一块小小的铭牌，上面写着：
杰克・威尔逊——布拉德福德足球俱乐部主教练（第五级别联赛）
【叮！金牌教练系统已激活！】
如今，伊森（现在应称杰克）拥有了全新的机会。系统赋予他实时战术分析、球探报告、球员成长洞察以及传奇战术等能力。
从这支无人问津、名不见经传的俱乐部起步，到登顶世界足坛——成为历史上最伟大的教练？
他曾是全世界最受嘲讽的教练。
而现在，他将势不可挡。
因为这一次……他绝不允许自己再输。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/663183f753e86c11f458fb00617c321f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"战斗暴龙兽","author_id":"","book_id":"7551400737519979582","book_name":"重生：我是金牌教练","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d08080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551430820217506878","read_count":"288","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1062313"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"281","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,打脸,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/663183f753e86c11f458fb00617c321f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363583&x-signature=5ezkLqB1MCRBPpfVi9SO6jC9SB0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"163"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221939432F16BA1E1E2CFCFB6030"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9663,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":134},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick
